name: 前院
description: 仰松园的前院，有客厅和门房。田家会客和日常起居的主要场所。

visual.prompt: Chinese merchant mansion front courtyard, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 梅院
description: 仰松园东面的院落，院内有一棵老梅树。多年前曾有人在此上吊身亡，院门常年上锁。如今舞翩住在北屋，东屋仍被封贴锁住。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion courtyard with plum tree, moonlit night, mysterious atmosphere, oil painting style

name: 菊院
description: 仰松园的内院，老爷太太住在「家主房」里屋，阿叶住在「女仆房」。院内有花圃和库房。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion inner courtyard with chrysanthemum garden, traditional architecture, oil painting style

name: 荷院
description: 仰松园西面的院落，纤娣住南屋，绘儿住北屋。院内有一个水池，池边曾发生命案。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion courtyard with lotus pond, morning light, oil painting style

name: 花园
description: 仰松园的花园，有假山、竹林、亭子和花圃。中秋夜宴设在此处，留声机曾放在亭子西南。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion moonlit garden with rockery, bamboo grove and pavilion, oil painting style

name: 竹院
description: 绪园住的院落，北屋是绪园的房间。院内有亭子，曾在此唱戏饮酒。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion courtyard with bamboo, theatrical props scattered, oil painting style
